mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM alert_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM alert_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND risk_type = #{riskType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_event SET is_read = #{isRead} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alert_event SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
